text: I'm going to be King of the Pirates! - Monkey D. Luffy, One Piece
Believe it! I never go back on my word, that is my nindo. - Naruto Uzumaki
I am going to be the very best, like no one ever was. To catch them is my real test, to train them is my cause.
The world isn't perfect. But it's there for us, doing the best it can, and that's what makes it so damn beautiful.
Whatever you lose, you'll find it again. But whatever you give away, you'll keep forever.
I will become the Hokage! That is my dream! I never go back on my word because that is my ninja way!
To know what you prefer instead of humbly saying Amen to what the world tells you you ought to prefer, is to have kept your soul alive.
The moment you give up is the moment you let someone else win. But the moment you keep trying is the moment you win.
The pain of being alone is completely out of this world, isn't it? I don't know why, but I understand your feelings so much.
I hate so many things about the way that you treat me. You never take anything seriously. You treat everything like a game.
If you only face forward, you cannot see what is behind you. But if you look back, you cannot move forward. So keep moving ahead.
The thing I hate the most is not being able to protect the people I care about. That is why I will become stronger.
I'm not a hero because I want people to praise me. I'm a hero because I want to save people who are crying.
The scariest thing about death is that it comes without warning. One day you are alive, and the next you are gone forever.
Even if I am not strong enough, I will still fight. Because that is what it means to be a swordsman.
